query_result.reasoning:
Now I have all the data I need. Let me compile the final answer.

The AI segment's total adjustments = $5,118 million
The total consolidated adjustment = $11,521 million
AI segment's contribution = 44.42%

Let me present this clearly.

tool_calls.name: submit_final_result
tool_calls.args:
{"final_result": "## AI Segment's Contribution to the Consolidated GAAP-to-Adjusted-EBITDA Bridge (FY2025)

### Consolidated Bridge (Net Income → Adjusted EBITDA)

| Adjustment Line Item | Consolidated ($M) |
|:---|---:|
| Depreciation & amortization | 6,701 |
| Share-based compensation | 1,947 |
| Restructuring charges | 487 |
| Impairments | 38 |
| Interest expense | 1,945 |
| Interest income | (492) |
| Other (income) expense, net | 177 |
| Provision for income taxes | 718 |
| **Total Consolidated Adjustment** | **11,521** |

*(Net income of $(4,937)M + $11,521M in adjustments = Adjusted EBITDA of $6,584M)*

### AI Segment's Adjustments (Income from Operations → Segment Adjusted EBITDA)

| Adjustment Line Item | AI Segment ($M) | % of Consolidated Line |
|:---|---:|---:|
| Depreciation & amortization | 3,568 | 53.25% |
| Share-based compensation | 1,063 | 54.60% |
| Restructuring charges | 487 | 100.00% |
| Impairment | — | 0.00% |
| **Total AI Segment Adjustment** | **5,118** | |

### Result

$$\frac{\text{AI Segment Adjustments}}{\text{Total Consolidated Adjustments}} = \frac{5{,}118}{11{,}521} = \mathbf{44.42\%}$$

**The AI segment contributed $5,118 million in adjustments, representing 44.42% of the total $11,521 million consolidated GAAP-to-Adjusted-EBITDA bridge for FY2025.**

Key observations:
- The AI segment accounts for **100% of all restructuring charges** ($487M) in the consolidated entity.
- The AI segment represents over half of consolidated D&A (53.25%) and SBC (54.60%), reflecting the capital- and compensation-intensive nature of the xAI operations (retrospectively recast into all periods).
- The remaining 55.58% of the consolidated bridge consists of adjustments from the Space and Connectivity segments ($4,055M in operating-level adjustments) plus corporate/unallocated items ($2,348M in interest, other income, and tax adjustments that are not allocated to segments).

{
  "sources": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1181412/000162828026036936/spaceexplorationtechnologi.htm",
      "name": "SpaceX S-1 Filing (Filed May 20, 2026)"
    }
  ]
}"}
